shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg -n \"direction|getComputedStyle|rtl|RTL\" src test* . --glob '"'!node_modules'"' --glob '"'!dist'"' | head -240 && rg --files | head -80"
/bin/bash -lc "cat package.json && rg -n \"MutationObserver|ResizeObserver|requestAnimationFrame|useEffect\\(\" src/components src/hooks src/modules | head -160"

/bin/bash -lc "git log --all --oneline -- src/components/LightboxRoot.tsx | head -30 && git branch -a && sed -n '1,130p' src/modules/Portal.tsx && sed -n '1,100p' src/hooks/useContainerRect.ts && sed -n '1,180p' test/unit/test-utils.tsx"
/bin/bash -lc "git status --short && nl -ba src/components/LightboxRoot.tsx | sed -n '8,48p' && nl -ba test/unit/RTL.spec.ts | sed -n '90,130p'"
